text:
¿Cómo hacer stream?
Recuerden :
- No omitir anuncios.
- Reproducir en calidad superior a 480p.
- Reproducir en pantalla grande. 
- Full volumen. 
- Usen el buscador : 'Butter Bts'. 
- No retroceder, no avanzar, ni poner pausa.
- Desactivar Reproducción automática y subtitulos.
- Reproducir alternando con otros vídeos (Dynamite, Mic Drop, ON, Black swan, Idol, Life goes on, Fake Love) para que no nos bajen las vistas.
- Evitar comentar con las palabras : 'stream' 'vistas' 'views' y NO poner emojis. 
Y sobre todo: DISFRUTEN ESTE ARTE 
GET IT, LET IT, ROOLLLLLL

author: @startupishere8013
text: Don't comment streaming that way that's a rumor spread that it deletes views..I have a friend who is product manager at utube who told me...Instead not seeing normal behaviour deletes views..So pls comment right way and use emojis some nasty antis commented this that we would do the wrong way so that our work increases...Please spread the knowledge... if u comment in abnormal way it gets detected..bcz every alphabet , number , special characters have different values assigned in form of binary values..So when the algorithm gets the comment source it serves as inappropriate because of different binary values...This can be explained Ah when you choose your password for google account it says to make a password of alphabets , numerics and special characters which gives a unique value of your id .. And when you do type that from gmail the database collects it as normal..but here when you comment it the comment has to be as expressive as it can use of words , emojis which is termed as normal human behaviour ... And if a lot of people behave in the same way in the abnormal way of commenting a lot of collapsing values generate a sequence which makes the algorithm believe that it is a botnet performing a DDoS attack..That is why your views get deleted..Hope you understood plz share the knowledge

author: @anordinaryasian3183
text:
BTS came from a small company, they started with nothing.
Jin who was casted just because of his looks,
Suga who left his family and gambled his education just to do what he really wanted to be,
Namjoon who was never have been supported by his parents,
Jimin who thought himself as ugly and fat,
Taehyung whose always been part of BTS but was never shown in any promotions- not until they debut,
Hoseok who seemed to always laugh but never felt as an accomplishment to his father,
And Jungkook who was very shy and have saved his parents at a young age by auditioning to companies.
Remember the days when they were struggling?
They even have to sacrifice and work hard just so they could eat?
They were squeezing themselves into one small apartment and have to take responsibilities- the reason why they wrote the song 'Move'.

Those times when Jimin has to starve himself just because people calls him fat and ugly.
That one interview where Yoongi said that; it was nice that people listens to their music because Taehyung and Jungkook are good looking.
And he thought that it was at least enough.
Do you remember when Hoseok was supposed to be the vocalist and Taehyung is the rapper, but he chose to rap instead and learn it because Taehyung wants to be a Vocalist.
It was Taehyung's dream and Hoseok loves his dongsaeng that much he would sacrifice.
Other fan base were accusing them for plagiarism just because they had the smallest detail whose the same with other big K-pop group which is actually just a coincidence.
There was a time when Yoongi packed 300 gifts and letters just to give to their 300 fans who will attend at their mini fan meetings.
So why do people judge them so fastly?
Did you know that Jimin came all the way to Seoul from Busan just to persuade his dreams?
Did you know that Taehyung lived with his grandma gor almost half of his life making him innocent from what else is out there in our world?
Did you know that Jungkook set aside his embarrassment just to meet the others expectations?
Yes, he is the golden maknae, but he suffers too when he see his hyungs having a hard time, he cries.
And there was a time when Jimin caught him crying and the reason is because he misses his family.
Jungkook often cry secretly so that his hyungs wouldn't worry.
Did you know that Jin auditioned to make his mother proud of him and so that his mom would have something to brag off to those judgmental neighbors they have.
He worked hard on his vocals yet people called him talentless.
Did you know that Namjoon worked hard just to produce songs yet there was a time when his mom ruined his computer and broke his mike so he could focus on studying?
Did you know that Hoseok auditioned because he wanted his father to be proud of him?
Because he felt like he was a disappointment?
Those rookie days where they only listen to the awardings and be amazed by their seniors.
They can't do anything but to watch those idols who receives the awards.
The days when they were happy with just 300 views on YouTube, mini fangatherings, small numbers of followers, and one Daesang award.
They were contented.
And now they've reached to the top and became more successful. From 150 fans to 6M and counting,
From a small practice room to a bigger one,
From cramped dorm with roommates to big dorm with each of them having a room,
From one daesang award to more awards and they've even won on BBMAs.
BTS never expected this before their fourth year anniversary, they've come so far- so far that the only chance we have to see them is to go to their concertor (NEVER) meet them along the street with 0.01% chance.
But really ARMYs! We've came this far fam, let's love them and give them our support till the end!
I wanted to thank y'all. I love you fam! I love BTS. Let's stay together until the end. If you believe in what I've said. If you believe in 1! 2! 3!
A true ARMY shall spread this

author: @in_naa
text:
- Stream Spotify, Youtube, Apple Music, Tidal, Amazon, Pandora, Google Play Music. 
- Buy ITunes, Google Play, Amazon. please buy EACH song INDIVIDUALLY. For example, DO NOT buy the title track then push the “complete album” button when you buy the track on itunes (use iTunes in of phone, there is also a PC version for your computer for iTunes), google play. This is important to make sure the title track will chart higher on the Billboard Hot100 chart. If you buy one track and then buy the whole album, the system will delete your single song purchase and you will only contribute to the Billboard 200 chart which is strictly for albums, not for songs. I repeat, buying songs individually contributes to a higher position for songs on the BBHOT100 chart and that means even more radioplay for BTS! Not tomention, it helps the album chart on BB200 too! 
- Use SHAZAM when you play the song, whether on Spotify, Apple Music, Youtube, Google Play Music, etc. This is extremely important because shazams lead to more radio play which means further exposure to the general public! Shazam is an app that identifies any music it can detect in your environment. People use it to find out the title and artist of a new song they like. It is super easy to use, you only have to open the app and push a button when the song is playing, and it takes the app less than 5 seconds to identify a song. Radio DJs use Shazam to find out which songs interest people the most, which songs they are curious about. (tutorial @BTSonShazam on twitter). 
- Requesting the from radio stations. We mostly focus on US charting, so we usually request from US radio stations. There’s many fanbase account that can guide you in this, the biggest one is BTSx50States, follow them and they’ll help you. All you really have to do is tweet at the radio station and ask them to play this BTS song. The more request they get, the more likely they’ll play our boys’ song. Don’t forget that only typed tweets count as legit requests, radio stations don’t care if you “like” or retweet another person’s request! You have to make your own request to count. Everybody can help with this, even not US, you only have to have a twitter account. follow @BTSx50States. 
- follow @btsanalytics, @btschartdata, @BTS_Billboard, @BTSx50States.

text:
*Please read this and spread this:*
We have less streams than Butter, BUT don't be sad because remember that Butter is only three minutes long while PTD is five minutes. Butter got 108M views in 24 hours, so basically people listened to Butter for 324M minutes in total (108Mx3=324M). PTD got 68M in 24 hours, so people listened to this for 340M minutes in total (68Mx5=340M). We might have less in stream, but people listened to this about 16M more minutes than Butter in the first 24 hours, so CONGRATS TO ALL ARMYS!!!

author: @yashibasanil123
text:
Hi ARMIES! I love that this comment section has become our new chatroom. I have something really funny to share with you all. Today something really hilarious happened. My finals started today and I had my history paper. So before we sit down in the hall to give our exam we have to deposit our phones in a table together, we are supposed to switch it off but I don't know since I was in a rush before the exam I must have forgotten to switch my phone off. Anyway idk what happened but right in the middle of the exam my phone alarm rang breaking the exam hall silence and FYI my phone alarm tone is Baepsae xD
The entire hall started laughing and I was so embarrassed, I was ready to dig a hole and hide but anyway I had to get up and go switch my phone off. After I finished switching my phone off I really thought the invigilating teacher was gonna be mad and give me an earful for not switching my phone of earlier but to my surprise she was laughing and she was like- You're an ARMY? Me too!

I.Was.Jungshook.
I never expected my teacher to be an ARMY but lmao I love how we really can find ARMY's everywhere xD

P.S Spring Day reached 7 mil Let's get 11 mil before 24 hours fam!

author: @sarxta2261
text: When I found BTS, I thought,"oh I'll just watch stuff with them, learn their names, and listen to their music!" I didn't sign up for setting alarms at 3-4 am when I go to bed at 11 or midnight. I didn't sign up for voting in all those award shows. I didn't sign up for countless of hours of streaming. I didn't sign up to become a conspiracy theorist or detective. At first, I did those things because we were telling each other to and I followed along. Before, I asked myself "Why am I doing this?" and it hit me. I love BTS. It's the least I could do for them. They pulled me out of the dark. Through their music and success, they taught me so much. If staying up a little later can help people achieve their dreams, it's a very small price to pay. 💜💜

author: @박눋욀
text:
Okay so right now I really need a place to speak my mind.

I discovered BTS around the time of their debut, at that time I was 14 years old. I was a lost child, seriously lost. Like I was suffering from identity crisis after loosing all of my memories at the age of 10. I was depressed, hated myself, thought I was stupid, ugly, and abnormal due to my lack of past experiences and memories. 

I had given up on my life, literally. I wanted nothing but to drown myself in my books and hide away from people. Which eventually caused kids my age to think it was fun to pick on me. The picking increased and suddenly I found myself being hit, kept outside of groups, and unwanted at all costs. Then one day, sitting at home I clicked here and there on the internet, and mysteriously ended up discovering BTS' "We Are Bulletproof Pt. 2". At first I must admit I didn't understand a single thing. I simply thought I had ended up on the "weird" side of Youtube. But the beat and the mv were awesome. So I eventually found myself returning to that song. I eventually became interested in this odd asian boy group. Then I happened to stumble upon "No More Dream", and the lyrics hit me hard in the feels. I guess the fact that I was living my life as some dead person with no dreams, no hopes, and nothing, became quite obvious the moment I heard the song. And I thought I needed to get myself together before it would be too late. 

My interest grew in these boys as time flew by. And somehow whenever I would feel out of place or that I needed a break I found myself returning to listen to their songs. And I guess, somewhere along the line I really appreciated the fact that their songs happened to be released in times I needed them the most. The time I was picked on, and hated, I found myself listening to "2kool4skool". The times I hated the teachers and school in general I found myself listening to "N.O". The times I really needed some comfort and felt depressed songs like "Tomorrow" and "Let Me Know" where keeping me together. And so I was really happy to have this special place to turn to, whenever I felt like I couldn't go on anymore.  

Time has passed, fast forward into the the present, and now we have the 18 year old me. I'm now living my life happily, with friends and family that I really appreciate, with grades hitting the top, and most importantly hopes and dreams. The 14 year old confused and depressed child has withered away just like the fallen leaves of October, and a new me has been let been let out into the world. 

Everyone has their story, and this is mine. I love BTS and even though I've never met them or anything near that, I feel as though I owe a big "thank you" to these amazing boys. I had entered the ARMY family back when only a few hundreds knew of BTS. The time I streamed their music hoping that one day they might win at a music show or at least get 50.000 views on a song that has been released weeks ago if not months. And now looking at how far they've reached I cannot help but be proud, happy and grateful to these guys. These boys that only had a total of 200 fans attending their concert back in the days, are now holding major world tours for ton of fans that love them all over the world. These boys that got a total of 20.000 views on their mv's, now beats insane records with 20.000 views a day. These boys that were told that they weren't good enough, that got hated by tons of people, that started from the bottom, has now risen to shiny stars that no one could ever even dream of harming. 

BTS, if you're reading this, I want you to know that you are the most precious and loved people in my heart. Stay strong, and always keep shining.

Thank you BigHit for making this happen.
Thank you BTS for being there when I needed you the most.
Thank you ARMY for letting me feel that I had a place somewhere in this world. 

I'm sorry I wrote such a long comment, please don't hate me <3
And english is not my first language, so please ignore the mistakes I make here and there. 
Thank you for reading <3

author: @DanisbelMuro
text:
So I will give sort of a personal story here because why not? ARMYS are family right? Before last year I was not a fan that streamed BTS songs, cared about trophies or anything like that. I really liked BTS but BTS was for me like another kpop group that I listened to, I liked them very much but they didn't hold a special place in my heart. That was until Suga's mixtape was dropped on October of last year. I was a freshman in college, my grades sucked pretty much, I didn't even know why I woke up everyday, I didn't like my major. Because I didn't have a dream or I didn't have anything I wanted to do I let other people tell me what to do, what to study and how was I supposed to live my live. When I listened to "So Far Away" I started crying because I looked up the lyrics and they were so relatable. Before that I had never looked for BTS lyrics because lyrics were not as important to me as the melody, the badass choreography and the pretty boys in kpop, I never expected a kpop group would have lyrics like that, most of them were about safe topics like girlfriends, parties, topics that I was so tired of that I stopped looking at lyrics. Until that day I listened to "So Far Away" I thought "who is this person that talks about his past struggles? he is so touching, I've never seen anything like him before , he is so amazing and encouraging" That's what I thought. Of course I knew SUGA, I knew the SUGA from BTS, the sort of branded version of himself but I didn't know Min Yoongi. 

So after that I started listening to the song every single day, sometimes the song would make me cry at school because it was so relatable. I sort of woke up every morning thinking "Aww why I have to go to school" "Why do I have to memorize all this shit I don't really care about?" "Why is it that I don't have a dream?" I truly feel that that song made me change my major because it gave me the courage to think for myself what was that I really wanted. Suga did this for me, that's how amazing he is.

Soon I realized that it was not only Suga but all BTS members were so inspiring. And now I want to give back what they had gave me with the least thing that I can do which is streaming.

This is just a part of my story. There are definitely more things that BTS has done for me.
Maybe I 'll do part 2 of this comment XD

author: @meiq1245
text:
Guys, I know not much people will read this...but anyways...
BTS isn't just a typical Korean boy band. They are #infiring. Look at some of their lyrics, not all of them are about relationships. Look at Born Singer and some others. Not much idols have such beautiful and infiring lyrics. This is what makes BTS different from others. They sing, they dance, and they like what they are doing. They participate in making their own songs, while most other idols just leave them to their producers or whatever you call them. They write about their life, their dreams. JungKook even had a song just to thank his hyungs, while he has some other options. Can't haters see why we love them that much? Because they infire us. They have a bond like blood-related brothers. They are talented, they got an amount of awards, but they stay humble, as if they were rookies(LMAO Red Velvet, sorry if I trigger any of you because I am a ARMY and ReVel myself, so...yeah).
I repeat guys, they are #infiring. They aren't just a typical Korean boy band. They are our role models. They tell us to not give up our dreams, and to do what you want.
ARMY AND BANGTAN ARE A FAMILY. Even if we encounter any challenges, we will never give up.
TODAY WE FIGHT!
Sorry for this long comment and if I make any mistakes. I mainly speak Cantonese.

author: @EchoSiera
text:
I remember about two years ago, my friend told me about this band she liked. She said they were a boy band from Korea and there were 7 members. My initial reaction was, this seems interesting, I’ve never heard of something like this before. But I didn’t think much of it. 
A couple months later, that same friend played me a song called Butterfly. I instantly wondered who the artist was, it was the most beautiful song I think I’ve ever heard. She told me it was bts. 
When I got home I listened to it all night, even as I fell asleep; that’s when I took interest in BTS. 
I started to research about them & their music, and I was sure I’d never be able to tell their faces apart, let alone their voices. But as I searched for more songs, I found spring day and listened to it... I cried. 
Even though I didn’t know what they were saying, the music was touching enough. Using the captions I saw their amazing lyrics and got more emotional. 
From that moment on, I’ve stanned bts for more than a year. I’ve learnt so much about each member and I just recently saw them in concert. They’re really more than just a boy band from Korea like I originally thought.
If you’ve read this far you deserve flowers 💐💐💐 just thought I would share my army story :) feel free to share yours
EDIT: omg 700 likes!?!! I never imagined anyone would actually read this story, I was just feeling emotional and wanted to share. bts is such an important part of my life now and if I could go back I would only stan them sooner! thanks so much :)

author: @lilyd.5792
text:
I used to be an anti who was like oh ew Kpop all the groups are so fake and the music is all the same... I continued that mindset until I saw Jooe from momoland in the Tropicana sparkling commercial... I got interested but after listening to momolands two songs I was like hmm they’re basically the same. 

But after watching two momoland vids, bts meme vids popped up on my recommendation list so I watched them and immediately took a liking to their personalities. I couldn’t care less about their appearances as meme vids tended to have their less attractive moments(still attractive though) on display. About two vids later I fell in love and after a week I could identify each of their front back and side profiles, names, and all. I consider myself only as a fan as the army CAN be pretty whack. Anyways I got addicted and started staying up late watching their videos and bumped into singularity... I immediately fell for the lyrics the vibe the aesthetic and ever since I’ve been in love with all of them (with taehyung as my bias). I got so much anxiety because I had no one to fan girl to them about that I couldn’t eat much for about a week or two. I couldn’t tell my sister because she was an anti and called kpop fans koreaboos. I agree to an extent with her because koreaboos do get on my nerves so I slowly showed her videos and after she watched their live go go performance, she’s been falling down the rabbit hole with me. Thanks for reading!

author: @girlgottagame
text: I just realized that this actually very well may be a tribute to the Sewol Ferry victims. As some of you may know, BTS made a generous donation to those affected by the Sewol Ferry sinking. One of the things that has been bugging me the most is the reasoning behind all those clothes. It just didn't make sense until I thought about those clothes belonging to a large number of people. The pile of clothes represents all of the victims of the Sewol Ferry and considering about 300 people died, there would be a considerable number of clothes. Another point I want to make are the shoes. Everyone believes the shoes belong to a member but Jimin found them washed up on a beach. Those shoes also represent the victims of the ferry sinking and they hang those shoes in homage. Obviously there's more to the MV and it's not all just a tribute but I do believe that those two things have a tie to the Sewol Ferry. Again I could be wrong but right now it's the only explanation that makes sense to me for that large pile of clothes and the whole shoes theory just came to me

author: @vakandagorl
text: BLACKPINK Trash They're pretty popular in Korea the things is that most groups when they debut their company puts them in as many variety shows as they can because that's how audiences get to know a group. ALL entertainment companies usually do this then the audience get to know the artist through their music later. YG doesn't put their artists on many variety shows and instead tries to attract the public through music first then variety appearances. All of the public events BP have been doing recently have been helping them become known a lot more publicly but because they don't have a lot of appearances on Alot of variety channels it's also not helping them. Usually when groups appear on shows their name brand goes up rapidly like when we've seen BP in the very few variety shows they've been on they become the number 1 search. This comes from looking up images, videos, music etc.. if BP appeared in more variety shows as they've been doing with radio shows they would probably do really well in Korean charts.

text:
Blinks let's make our fandom toxic free this year!
 
1. Don't throw hate on any other groups and taking BLACKPINK name to drag others 

2. Don't treat other fandoms badly even if they give hate to us.

3. Let's show love to every single member of BLACKPINK. There is no popularity contest between them, so stop comparing and dragging other members just to “love” your bias. (even if you have one bias, support all 4 because the girls consider themselves a family!!)

4. Please don’t fight amongst ourselves for screen time or line distribution. The girls worked hard on their songs as a GROUP so we should support all of them. Instead of just complaining, appreciate what we got.

5. This year we shall focus more on str3@ming properly, voting for awards, and more involvement as a community!
That will make us good and not toxic like others. 

Remember, a united fandom is a strong fandom!!

~~Spread this everywhere~~

 Let's start new year by being a toxic free fandom I love you all blinks!

author: @someperson6475
text:
BLACKPINK PWF AND STAY THEORY::::
PWF::
basically all of them are in a abusive relationship.
lisa is the only one who got out of the relationship, hence her sitting far away from the guy in this bus, and when she wasn't with him she was smiling. 
rosé thinks that her being in this toxic relationship is fate, so she hugs the guy at the end. but the fate sign starts burning up. this means it's not really her fate and she can change it but she is making it her fate by choosing to stay with the guy. 
jisoo is staying in the closet for protection. she peeks out of it but stays in there because she is scared. 
jennie is blinded by the love, hence her covering her eyes before lisa's rap part. she probably knows it's toxic but she doesn't want to leave because she is too in love, but she slowly realises that the love isnt true love, hence the fire on the match she is holding is becoming smaller.
now, jennie jisoo and rosé choose to ignore it and just find distractions. jisoo continues to hide herself, rosé reads and jennie plays music. 
they are all in trouble. the clock is showing that time is running out for them to be saved. 
the scene with lisa standing on the bridge is very significant. she is looking out and the sky is blue, showing she is sad and doesn't know how to feel. as the fire starts burning the bridge, the sky turns blue to purple. this shows that she is realising that all her unnie's hearts are burning with love and passion, but at the same time are angry. she feels their anger and chooses to save them. 
jennie finally realises that her relationship is toxic, hence her standing on the bridge with the purple sky like lisa. jisoo is too scared to face her fears and rosé continues to be in the relationship. 
lisa is very worried as time is quickly running out. she is tossing and turning in her sleep. she doesn't know what to do. 
at the end, jisoo, jennie and rosé die. the tv with her and the guy in it slowly fades away, and her books are around the tv, meaning she is not using them anymore. jennie realised that she can save herself but she was too late. jisoo also died, hence the skull head on her shirt. 
the alarm clock rings, and lisa wakes up. she sees that her unnies died and that it was too late. 
STAY::
in stay, rosé, jisoo and jennie are in heaven. they can do whatever they want and are happy. rosé plays her guitar, jisoo is on a swing that has a skateboard as the place where she sits. this is hinted by the heaven references (there was a sign that said heaven is a place...blah blah i cant remember it off the top of my head.)
lisa is struggling, and has to make a decision whether she should join her unnies in heaven or stay in the real world, hence the dark corridor she is in. the end is dark, and the blackpink sign is there, and that is where she goes to get to heaven. 
lisa stands on a bridge/road in the sky thing (idk what it's called, sorry my english is bad lol), which shows her what it would be like to join her unnies. this is shown through them standing on a car, together and happy. they look out to a cluster of structures that are burning, with smoke coming out. this represents the real world and it's horrors. 
at the end, lisa makes the decision to go to heaven with her unnies. they reunite, all happy and dancing together. the group of people in white surrounding them are angels. 
anyways it probably isn't correct but i tried haha. keep streaming blinks fighting!!
edit: thank you for all the likes!! wasn't expecting it and i really enjoyed reading your theories.

4. Please don’t fight amongst ourselves for screen time or line distribution. The girls worked hard on their songs as a GROUP so we should support all of them. Instead of just complaining, appreciate what we got.

5. This year we shall focus more on str3@ming properly, voting for awards, and more involvement as a community!
That will make us good and not toxic like others. 

Remember, a united fandom is a strong fandom!!

~~Spread this everywhere~~

 Let's start new year by being a toxic free fandom I love you all blinks!!
